title: GMS Week 40- BYPASSING BEACHES!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 10/10/2022
Image reference: 2022-10-10_gms-week-40-bypassing-beaches_img1.jpg
Sub-continent markets appear to have disappeared back into the ether for another week, as trading markets rebound and candidates for recycling start to dissipate. In recent weeks, volatile steel plate prices, a constantly deteriorating currency and starved U.S. Dollar credit lines across India, Pakistan and Bangladesh have all led to a near total halt on buying at anywhere near respectable levels.
